{
  "label": "IoT",
  "component": "application",
  "reason": "ClearSCADA / EcoStruxure Geo SCADA Expert is purpose-built supervisory control software used to monitor and control remote industrial field devices (RTUs, sensors, actuators), making it an active orchestration element in Industrial IoT systems. The vulnerability is in the software layer itself, fitting the application layer definition.",
  "category": "scada platform",
  "sector": "industrial iot"
}

{
  "label": "IoT",
  "component": "device",
  "reason": "The vulnerable product is an IP camera designed specifically for consumer smart home monitoring, operating with dedicated camera firmware; command injection occurs in the device’s own web interface, making it an issue in the device layer of an IoT system.",
  "category": "cameras",
  "sector": "consumer iot"
}

{
  "label": "IoT",
  "component": "device",
  "reason": "Honeywell Experion PKS is a distributed control system used to interface with and control industrial sensors/actuators. It is purpose-built for industrial IoT/OT environments and the vulnerable modules reside in the embedded controller/firmware layer, not generic IT software. Therefore it is classified as an IoT device-layer vulnerability.",
  "category": "industrial controller",
  "sector": "industrial iot"
}

{
  "label": "IoT",
  "component": "application",
  "reason": "Suprema BioStar 2 is a biometric access-control platform used to manage and control physical IoT devices (door controllers/readers). The vulnerability is in the server-side web application, fitting the IoT ecosystem’s application layer.",
  "category": "access_control",
  "sector": "industrial iot"
}

{
  "label": "IoT",
  "component": "application",
  "reason": "Bosch IP Helper is a specialized application used to discover/configure Bosch IP cameras, which are IoT devices. The tool belongs to the application layer of an IoT system and is purpose-built for managing those devices, so the vulnerability directly impacts the IoT ecosystem.",
  "category": "cameras",
  "sector": "industrial iot"
}

{
  "label": "IoT",
  "component": "application",
  "reason": "GE Proficy HMI/SCADA CIMPLICITY is an industrial control/HMI software that interfaces with sensors, actuators, and PLCs in operational technology environments. As an orchestration layer within Industrial IoT systems, it is an active functional element of an IoT deployment. The directory-traversal flaw is in the application layer (CimWeb component).",
  "category": "scada/hmi",
  "sector": "industrial iot"
}

{
  "label": "IoT",
  "component": "application",
  "reason": "EcoStruxure Power Monitoring Expert, Energy Expert, and Power SCADA Operation are purpose-built industrial energy‐monitoring/SCADA platforms that ingest data from field power sensors and breakers, making them active elements of an industrial IoT system rather than general-purpose software. The vulnerability is in their web-based application layer (URL redirection flaw).",
  "category": "scada/energy monitoring",
  "sector": "industrial iot"
}

{
  "label": "IoT",
  "component": "device",
  "reason": "B. Braun SpaceCom2 is an embedded communication module for infusion pumps, a purpose-built medical device operating in healthcare IoT environments. The flaw is in the device’s firmware (lack of signature verification), so it sits at the device layer.",
  "category": "medical device",
  "sector": "healthcare iot"
}

{
  "label": "IoT",
  "component": "communication",
  "reason": "Eclipse Mosquitto is an implementation of the MQTT broker; MQTT is a low-power, pub/sub protocol explicitly designed and predominantly used for IoT and M2M communication. The broker is an active element of an IoT system’s communication layer, and the vulnerability targets this purpose-built IoT technology, so it is IoT-specific.",
  "category": "network infrastructure/gateway",
  "sector": "other"
}

{
  "label": "IoT",
  "component": "application",
  "reason": "Thermoscan IP is a purpose-built temperature-monitoring solution that interfaces with IP-connected sensors; it is an active element in an IoT deployment. The CWE-732 issue is in its installed application folder, affecting the software layer that manages the devices, so it belongs to the application component.",
  "category": "sensors",
  "sector": "industrial iot"
}

{
  "label": "IoT",

}

{
  "label": "IoT",

}

{

}

{

{
